title: PsychisSMP Client-side Mod
description: The required client-side mod for the Psychis SMP, updated to support newer versions.
body:
# Psychis SMP Client-side Mod
This is an update to the psychis smp mod for 1.21.11.  

The PaperMC plugin is REQUIRED for this mod to work.  To get it, head over to the Psychis SMP Patreon.
[Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/PsychisPatreon)

This plugin can only run on the client.  It will crash if a server tries to load it.

### Keybinds
There are three keybinds for the mod:
- Z -> Activates your first ability
- X -> Activates your second ability
- C -> Opens the icon configuration menu

Each keybind can be re-bound in the controls settings under "Psychis Keybinds".  

### Icon Config Menu
The ability icons can be resized and relocated wherever you like!  
Press "C" to open the menu.  Click and drag the ability to move it, or drag the white square in the bottom right corner to adjust the icon's size.  The "Reset" button moves everything back to its original location.
